title: BEM-841 minute monitor
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/autonomy','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:42 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
b840=load('governance/state/bem840_mailbox_mechanism_error_report.json')
missing=b840.get('missing',[])
monitor={'schema_version':'gpt_claude_mailbox_monitor.v1','status':'repo_side_monitor_configured_not_chatgpt_timer_proven','interval_minutes':1,'target':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt','proof_required':['workflow_dispatch_results','claude_runtime_state','real_claude_response'],'chatgpt_internal_timer_status':'not_available_in_current_toolset','operator_relay':'forbidden','created_at':created}
Path('governance/autonomy/gpt_claude_mailbox_minute_monitor.json').write_text(json.dumps(monitor,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
if not missing:
    status='ready_to_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='next_repair_dispatch_results'
    next_action='repair workflow dispatch result writer/queue processing'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='next_repair_claude_runtime_state'
    next_action='repair Claude dispatcher runtime proof'
else:
    status='next_repair_real_claude_response'
    next_action='repair real Claude response writer/provider'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'monitor_status':monitor['status'],'interval_minutes':1,'bem840_status':b840.get('status'),'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_minute_monitor_config_and_next_repair.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_minute_monitor_config_and_next_repair.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Minute Monitor Config And Next Repair | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Monitor: repo-side 1 minute config exists, ChatGPT internal timer not proven in current toolset.'+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/autonomy/gpt_claude_mailbox_minute_monitor.json','governance/state/bem841_minute_monitor_config_and_next_repair.json','governance/reports/bem841_minute_monitor_config_and_next_repair.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Configured repo-side one-minute Claude mailbox monitor state without falsely claiming ChatGPT internal timer availability, and selected next missing-proof repair from BEM-840')
